creator: freebsd@bitter-almonds.com
text:
Created attachment 226968
Log of install failure of graphics/qt5-svg due to missing files

This is on FreeBSD 13-STABLE (at d6805ab0df5, 20210626), with Ports tree at commit 28fefbaf5a (20210805).

Deleting qt5-chooser deleted xpdf4 port along with multitude of other Qt5 ports.
So while trying to reinstall xpdf4 port, its build stopped during install of graphics/qt5-svg port (part of log; full log is attached) ...

...
===>   Registering installation for qt5-svg-5.15.2_1
pkg-static: Unable to access file /src-build/ports-build/src-build/ports/graphics/qt5-svg/work/stage/usr/local/include/qt5/QtSvg/5.15.2/QtSvg/private/qsvgfont_p.h:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /src-build/ports-build/src-build/ports/graphics/qt5-svg/work/stage/usr/local/include/qt5/QtSvg/5.15.2/QtSvg/private/qsvggraphics_p.h:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /src-build/ports-build/src-build/ports/graphics/qt5-svg/work/stage/usr/local/include/qt5/QtSvg/5.15.2/QtSvg/private/qsvghandler_p.h:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /src-build/ports-build/src-build/ports/graphics/qt5-svg/work/stage/usr/local/include/qt5/QtSvg/5.15.2/QtSvg/private/qsvgnode_p.h:No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /src-build/ports-build/src-build/ports/graphics/qt5-svg/work/stage/usr/local/include/qt5/QtSvg/5.15.2/QtSvg/private/qsvgstructure_p.h:No such file or directory
...


Let me know if you need to see OPTIONS of any of ports.
